_meta.disclaimerEn: This section is not financial advice. It does not predict income, investment outcomes, or financial success.
_meta.disclaimerZh: 此部分不是财务建议，也不预测收入、投资结果或财务成功。
_meta.note: Lookup by code key S6-01 … S6-44. Do not generate generic wealth content when a record is missing.

S6-01.moneyCoreFrequencyEn: Wealth is reflected through the clarity of your essence. The more aligned you are with your true self, the more naturally your value can be expressed.
S6-01.moneyCoreFrequencyZh: 财富来自你的本质清晰度。你越忠于自己的真我，财富越自然呈现。
S6-01.shadowFrequencyEn: Fear of being seen, fear of not being enough, and self-limitation rooted in unstable self-worth.
S6-01.shadowFrequencyZh: 怕被看见、怕不够好、价值感不足导致的自我设限。
S6-01.soulWealthRelationshipEn: Your relationship with wealth strengthens as your authentic expression becomes clearer.
S6-01.soulWealthRelationshipZh: 你的财富会随着你的真实表达能力而扩大。当你越真实，丰盛越靠近。
S6-01.karmicMoneyLessonEn: Learn to recognize your own value instead of waiting for external validation.
S6-01.karmicMoneyLessonZh: 学习承认自己的价值，而不是等待外界肯定。
S6-01.wisewaveGuidanceEn: When you stop hiding your light, value has room to meet you.
S6-01.wisewaveGuidanceZh: 当你不再隐藏你的光，财富就会出现。
S6-01.safetyDisclaimerEn: This section is not financial advice. It does not predict income, investment outcomes, or financial success. It reflects symbolic patterns around worth, receiving, value expression, visibility, and resource flow.
S6-01.safetyDisclaimerZh: 此部分不是财务建议，也不预测收入、投资结果或财务成功。它只用于映照你与价值、接收、表达、可见度与资源流动之间的象征性关系。

S6-02.moneyCoreFrequencyEn: Wealth flow is connected to intuition and subtle spiritual sensitivity. When you trust inner direction, your choices become more aligned.
S6-02.moneyCoreFrequencyZh: 财富流动取决于你的直觉与灵性敏锐度。当你信任灵魂指引，丰盛会自动排列。
S6-02.shadowFrequencyEn: Hesitation, avoidance, passivity, and dependence on other people’s opinions may cause missed opportunities.
S6-02.shadowFrequencyZh: 犹豫、逃避、被动、依赖他人意见导致错失机遇。
S6-02.soulWealthRelationshipEn: Your wealth pattern is less about force and more about aligned inner movement.
S6-02.soulWealthRelationshipZh: 你的财富来自灵魂的流动性，而非努力程度。
S6-02.karmicMoneyLessonEn: Learn to trust your inner direction instead of relying on external voices.
S6-02.karmicMoneyLessonZh: 学习信任内在的方向，而不是依赖外界声音。
S6-02.wisewaveGuidanceEn: Your intuition is one of your deepest sources of value.
S6-02.wisewaveGuidanceZh: 你的直觉是你真正的金矿。
S6-02.safetyDisclaimerEn: This section is not financial advice. It does not predict income, investment outcomes, or financial success. It reflects symbolic patterns around worth, receiving, value expression, visibility, and resource flow.
S6-02.safetyDisclaimerZh: 此部分不是财务建议，也不预测收入、投资结果或财务成功。它只用于映照你与价值、接收、表达、可见度与资源流动之间的象征性关系。

S6-03.moneyCoreFrequencyEn: Wealth is reflected through creativity and the ability to carry vision into form.
S6-03.moneyCoreFrequencyZh: 你的财富来自创造力与愿景能力。当你创造，你就吸引丰盛。
S6-03.shadowFrequencyEn: Distraction, lack of grounding, scattered ideas, and fear of responsibility.
S6-03.shadowFrequencyZh: 分心、无法落地、过度发散、害怕承担责任。
S6-03.soulWealthRelationshipEn: Your wealth pattern strengthens as your focus deepens.
S6-03.soulWealthRelationshipZh: 财富随着你的专注度提升而增长。
S6-03.karmicMoneyLessonEn: Learn to turn vision into structure instead of keeping it only as an idea.
S6-03.karmicMoneyLessonZh: 学习让愿景变成结构，而不是只停留在想法。
S6-03.wisewaveGuidanceEn: Inspiration opens the door; action carries it through.
S6-03.wisewaveGuidanceZh: 灵感是入口，行动才是关键。
S6-03.safetyDisclaimerEn: This section is not financial advice. It does not predict income, investment outcomes, or financial success. It reflects symbolic patterns around worth, receiving, value expression, visibility, and resource flow.
S6-03.safetyDisclaimerZh: 此部分不是财务建议，也不预测收入、投资结果或财务成功。它只用于映照你与价值、接收、表达、可见度与资源流动之间的象征性关系。

S6-04.moneyCoreFrequencyEn: Wealth is reflected through stability, endurance, and cumulative effort.
S6-04.moneyCoreFrequencyZh: 稳定、耐力、累积性的努力让你持续获得财富。
S6-04.shadowFrequencyEn: Fear of change, resistance to risk, and being bound by inertia.
S6-04.shadowFrequencyZh: 害怕变化、抗拒风险、被惯性束缚。
S6-04.soulWealthRelationshipEn: Your wealth pattern grows through consistent investment and long-term devotion.
S6-04.soulWealthRelationshipZh: 财富跟随你的持续投入而来，你的力量是“累积的丰盛”。
S6-04.karmicMoneyLessonEn: Release attachment to safety and allow yourself to step onto a larger stage.
S6-04.karmicMoneyLessonZh: 放下对安全感的执着，允许自己选择更大的舞台。
S6-04.wisewaveGuidanceEn: Your stability is the soil of your abundance.
S6-04.wisewaveGuidanceZh: 你的稳定，是你的财富土壤。
S6-04.safetyDisclaimerEn: This section is not financial advice. It does not predict income, investment outcomes, or financial success. It reflects symbolic patterns around worth, receiving, value expression, visibility, and resource flow.
S6-04.safetyDisclaimerZh: 此部分不是财务建议，也不预测收入、投资结果或财务成功。它只用于映照你与价值、接收、表达、可见度与资源流动之间的象征性关系。

S6-05.moneyCoreFrequencyEn: Wealth is reflected through communication, expression, and the ability to connect.
S6-05.moneyCoreFrequencyZh: 财富来自你的沟通、表达与连接能力。
S6-05.shadowFrequencyEn: People-pleasing, weak boundaries, self-doubt, and attachment to approval.
S6-05.shadowFrequencyZh: 讨好、失去界限、自我怀疑、依附认同感。
S6-05.soulWealthRelationshipEn: Your wealth pattern expands through sincere expression and aligned relationships.
S6-05.soulWealthRelationshipZh: 当你真诚表达、建立关系，你的丰盛会放大。
S6-05.karmicMoneyLessonEn: Learn not to sacrifice yourself in order to receive love.
S6-05.karmicMoneyLessonZh: 学会不为了获得爱而牺牲自己。
S6-05.wisewaveGuidanceEn: When you speak truth, value can hear you.
S6-05.wisewaveGuidanceZh: 当你说真话，财富会听见你。
S6-05.safetyDisclaimerEn: This section is not financial advice. It does not predict income, investment outcomes, or financial success. It reflects symbolic patterns around worth, receiving, value expression, visibility, and resource flow.
S6-05.safetyDisclaimerZh: 此部分不是财务建议，也不预测收入、投资结果或财务成功。它只用于映照你与价值、接收、表达、可见度与资源流动之间的象征性关系。

S6-06.moneyCoreFrequencyEn: Wealth is reflected through healing capacity, empathy, and emotional depth.
S6-06.moneyCoreFrequencyZh: 财富源自你的疗愈能力、同理心与灵魂深度。
S6-06.shadowFrequencyEn: Over-sacrifice, emotional entanglement, and difficulty separating your energy from others.
S6-06.shadowFrequencyZh: 过度牺牲、情绪卷入、难以与他人能量分离。
S6-06.soulWealthRelationshipEn: Your wealth pattern stabilizes as your boundaries become stronger.
S6-06.soulWealthRelationshipZh: 财富随着你“保持界限”的能力提升而稳定。
S6-06.karmicMoneyLessonEn: Do not carry other people’s emotions or pay the price for what is not yours.
S6-06.karmicMoneyLessonZh: 不承担他人的情绪，不为他人背负代价。
S6-06.wisewaveGuidanceEn: You are not here to rescue everyone; you are here to illuminate direction.
S6-06.wisewaveGuidanceZh: 你不是来拯救所有人，你是来点亮方向。
S6-06.safetyDisclaimerEn: This section is not financial advice. It does not predict income, investment outcomes, or financial success. It reflects symbolic patterns around worth, receiving, value expression, visibility, and resource flow.
S6-06.safetyDisclaimerZh: 此部分不是财务建议，也不预测收入、投资结果或财务成功。它只用于映照你与价值、接收、表达、可见度与资源流动之间的象征性关系。

S6-07.moneyCoreFrequencyEn: Wealth is reflected through spiritual wisdom and a broader perspective.
S6-07.moneyCoreFrequencyZh: 财富来自你的灵性智慧与高度视角。
S6-07.shadowFrequencyEn: Detachment from reality, abstract talk without action, and spiritual bypassing.
S6-07.shadowFrequencyZh: 脱离现实、空谈、缺乏行动、灵性逃避。
S6-07.soulWealthRelationshipEn: Your wealth pattern opens when wisdom becomes practical and grounded.
S6-07.soulWealthRelationshipZh: 财富出现于你将智慧落实到人间的时候。
S6-07.karmicMoneyLessonEn: Learn to let spirituality and reality work as one.
S6-07.karmicMoneyLessonZh: 学习让灵性与现实合而为一。
S6-07.wisewaveGuidanceEn: Wisdom must land before value can respond.
S6-07.wisewaveGuidanceZh: 智慧必须落地，丰盛才会回应。
S6-07.safetyDisclaimerEn: This section is not financial advice. It does not predict income, investment outcomes, or financial success. It reflects symbolic patterns around worth, receiving, value expression, visibility, and resource flow.
S6-07.safetyDisclaimerZh: 此部分不是财务建议，也不预测收入、投资结果或财务成功。它只用于映照你与价值、接收、表达、可见度与资源流动之间的象征性关系。

S6-08.moneyCoreFrequencyEn: Wealth is reflected through transformation: the ability to turn what is old, difficult, or hidden into value.
S6-08.moneyCoreFrequencyZh: 财富来自转化力量：让旧事物变成价值。
S6-08.shadowFrequencyEn: Control, possessiveness, jealousy, fear of loss, and energetic exhaustion.
S6-08.shadowFrequencyZh: 控制、占有、嫉妒、恐惧失去、能量消耗。
S6-08.soulWealthRelationshipEn: Your wealth pattern is connected to your capacity to release and renew.
S6-08.soulWealthRelationshipZh: 你的财富来自你敢于死亡与重生的能力。
S6-08.karmicMoneyLessonEn: Release control, accept change, and let energy move again.
S6-08.karmicMoneyLessonZh: 放下控制，接受改变，让能量重新流动。
S6-08.wisewaveGuidanceEn: When you release your grip, abundance has room to enter.
S6-08.wisewaveGuidanceZh: 当你放下，丰盛才会进入。
S6-08.safetyDisclaimerEn: This section is not financial advice. It does not predict income, investment outcomes, or financial success. It reflects symbolic patterns around worth, receiving, value expression, visibility, and resource flow.
S6-08.safetyDisclaimerZh: 此部分不是财务建议，也不预测收入、投资结果或财务成功。它只用于映照你与价值、接收、表达、可见度与资源流动之间的象征性关系。

S6-09.moneyCoreFrequencyEn: Wealth is reflected through insight, foresight, and strategic thinking.
S6-09.moneyCoreFrequencyZh: 财富来自你的洞察力、远见与策略能力。
S6-09.shadowFrequencyEn: Doubt, over-analysis, stagnation, and fear of making mistakes.
S6-09.shadowFrequencyZh: 怀疑、过度分析、停滞不前、害怕错误。
S6-09.soulWealthRelationshipEn: Your wealth pattern strengthens as decision-making becomes clearer.
S6-09.soulWealthRelationshipZh: 财富随着你的决断力提升而出现。
S6-09.karmicMoneyLessonEn: Learn to trust yourself instead of thinking endlessly.
S6-09.karmicMoneyLessonZh: 学会信任自己，而不是无限思考。
S6-09.wisewaveGuidanceEn: A clear mind is one of your strongest value fields.
S6-09.wisewaveGuidanceZh: 清晰的心，就是最强的财富磁场。
S6-09.safetyDisclaimerEn: This section is not financial advice. It does not predict income, investment outcomes, or financial success. It reflects symbolic patterns around worth, receiving, value expression, visibility, and resource flow.
S6-09.safetyDisclaimerZh: 此部分不是财务建议，也不预测收入、投资结果或财务成功。它只用于映照你与价值、接收、表达、可见度与资源流动之间的象征性关系。

S6-10.moneyCoreFrequencyEn: Wealth is reflected through responsibility, structure, and professional capability.
S6-10.moneyCoreFrequencyZh: 财富来自你的责任感、结构与专业能力。
S6-10.shadowFrequencyEn: Excessive pressure, harsh self-demands, and fear of failure.
S6-10.shadowFrequencyZh: 压力过大、自我要求、对失败的恐惧。
S6-10.soulWealthRelationshipEn: Your wealth pattern grows through stable achievement and mature responsibility.
S6-10.soulWealthRelationshipZh: 财富随着你的稳定成就感而增加。
S6-10.karmicMoneyLessonEn: Learn not to define yourself by achievement.
S6-10.karmicMoneyLessonZh: 学会不以成就定义自己。
S6-10.wisewaveGuidanceEn: You are not your achievements; you are the source from which achievement arises.
S6-10.wisewaveGuidanceZh: 你不是你的成就，你是成就的来源。
S6-10.safetyDisclaimerEn: This section is not financial advice. It does not predict income, investment outcomes, or financial success. It reflects symbolic patterns around worth, receiving, value expression, visibility, and resource flow.
S6-10.safetyDisclaimerZh: 此部分不是财务建议，也不预测收入、投资结果或财务成功。它只用于映照你与价值、接收、表达、可见度与资源流动之间的象征性关系。

S6-11.moneyCoreFrequencyEn: Wealth is reflected through freedom, adventure, and expansion.
S6-11.moneyCoreFrequencyZh: 财富来自你的自由、冒险精神与扩张能力。
S6-11.shadowFrequencyEn: Avoiding commitment, scattering energy, recklessness, and impulsiveness.
S6-11.shadowFrequencyZh: 逃避承诺、分散、鲁莽、冲动。
S6-11.soulWealthRelationshipEn: Your wealth pattern expands as you open to larger possibilities with grounded responsibility.
S6-11.soulWealthRelationshipZh: 财富跟随你对“更大的可能性”的开放程度。
S6-11.karmicMoneyLessonEn: Learn to take responsibility instead of escaping it.
S6-11.karmicMoneyLessonZh: 学习承担责任，而不是逃离责任。
S6-11.wisewaveGuidanceEn: When you choose focus, your abundance can move beyond old ceilings.
S6-11.wisewaveGuidanceZh: 当你选择专注，你的丰盛会突破天花板。
S6-11.safetyDisclaimerEn: This section is not financial advice. It does not predict income, investment outcomes, or financial success. It reflects symbolic patterns around worth, receiving, value expression, visibility, and resource flow.
S6-11.safetyDisclaimerZh: 此部分不是财务建议，也不预测收入、投资结果或财务成功。它只用于映照你与价值、接收、表达、可见度与资源流动之间的象征性关系。

S6-12.moneyCoreFrequencyEn: Wealth is reflected through compassion, healing presence, and emotional depth. The more deeply you understand the human heart, the more value you can create.
S6-12.moneyCoreFrequencyZh: 财富来自你的慈悲心、疗愈性与情感深度。你越能理解人心，越能创造价值。
S6-12.shadowFrequencyEn: Self-sacrifice, overgiving, and being emotionally captured by others.
S6-12.shadowFrequencyZh: 自我牺牲、过度付出、情绪被他人绑架。
S6-12.soulWealthRelationshipEn: Your wealth pattern strengthens as your emotional boundaries become healthier.
S6-12.soulWealthRelationshipZh: 你的财富会随着你学会更健康的情感界限而提升。
S6-12.karmicMoneyLessonEn: Do not exhaust yourself for love, and do not trade pain for value.
S6-12.karmicMoneyLessonZh: 不为爱而耗尽自己，不用痛苦换取价值。
S6-12.wisewaveGuidanceEn: When you care for yourself first, abundance can meet you more naturally.
S6-12.wisewaveGuidanceZh: 当你先照顾好自己，丰盛自然会照顾你。
S6-12.safetyDisclaimerEn: This section is not financial advice. It does not predict income, investment outcomes, or financial success. It reflects symbolic patterns around worth, receiving, value expression, visibility, and resource flow.
S6-12.safetyDisclaimerZh: 此部分不是财务建议，也不预测收入、投资结果或财务成功。它只用于映照你与价值、接收、表达、可见度与资源流动之间的象征性关系。

S6-13.moneyCoreFrequencyEn: Wealth is reflected through leadership, influence, and presence.
S6-13.moneyCoreFrequencyZh: 财富来自你的领导力、影响力与存在感。你天生能够带领他人。
S6-13.shadowFrequencyEn: Self-doubt, fear of responsibility, and fear of your own strength.
S6-13.shadowFrequencyZh: 自我怀疑、害怕承担、害怕自己太强大。
S6-13.soulWealthRelationshipEn: Your wealth pattern expands as you accept your own power.
S6-13.soulWealthRelationshipZh: 你的财富会随着你接受自己的力量而扩张。
S6-13.karmicMoneyLessonEn: Take responsibility instead of hiding from it. Step forward instead of staying behind the scenes.
S6-13.karmicMoneyLessonZh: 承担，而不是逃避。走到台前，而不是躲在幕后。
S6-13.wisewaveGuidanceEn: When you stand in your strength, life can make more space for you.
S6-13.wisewaveGuidanceZh: 当你愿意站在你的力量里，世界会为你让路。
S6-13.safetyDisclaimerEn: This section is not financial advice. It does not predict income, investment outcomes, or financial success. It reflects symbolic patterns around worth, receiving, value expression, visibility, and resource flow.
S6-13.safetyDisclaimerZh: 此部分不是财务建议，也不预测收入、投资结果或财务成功。它只用于映照你与价值、接收、表达、可见度与资源流动之间的象征性关系。

S6-14.moneyCoreFrequencyEn: Wealth is reflected through order, process, logic, and structural capability.
S6-14.moneyCoreFrequencyZh: 财富来自秩序、流程、逻辑、结构能力。
S6-14.shadowFrequencyEn: Perfectionism, excessive focus on details, and difficulty trusting others.
S6-14.shadowFrequencyZh: 完美主义、苛求细节、不信任他人。
S6-14.soulWealthRelationshipEn: Your wealth pattern can expand when structure is balanced with trust and flow.
S6-14.soulWealthRelationshipZh: 你越愿意信任流动，财富越会经历跳跃式成长。
S6-14.karmicMoneyLessonEn: Learn to release control instead of managing everything.
S6-14.karmicMoneyLessonZh: 学会放手，而不是凡事要掌控。
S6-14.wisewaveGuidanceEn: Order is your gift; trust is your growth.
S6-14.wisewaveGuidanceZh: 秩序是你的天赋，信任是你的成长。
S6-14.safetyDisclaimerEn: This section is not financial advice. It does not predict income, investment outcomes, or financial success. It reflects symbolic patterns around worth, receiving, value expression, visibility, and resource flow.
S6-14.safetyDisclaimerZh: 此部分不是财务建议，也不预测收入、投资结果或财务成功。它只用于映照你与价值、接收、表达、可见度与资源流动之间的象征性关系。

S6-15.moneyCoreFrequencyEn: Wealth is reflected through beauty, aesthetics, style, and artistic perception.
S6-15.moneyCoreFrequencyZh: 财富来自你的美感、审美能力、风格表达、艺术触觉。
S6-15.shadowFrequencyEn: Self-denial, comparison, and doubt in your creative value.
S6-15.shadowFrequencyZh: 自我否定、比较心、怀疑自己的创造价值。
S6-15.soulWealthRelationshipEn: Your wealth pattern strengthens when you allow beauty and aesthetics to become real value.
S6-15.soulWealthRelationshipZh: 财富随着你“敢于让美成为你的事业”而上升。
S6-15.karmicMoneyLessonEn: Stop doubting your unique aesthetic intelligence.
S6-15.karmicMoneyLessonZh: 不再怀疑自己的独特美感。
S6-15.wisewaveGuidanceEn: When you let the world see your beauty, value can see you too.
S6-15.wisewaveGuidanceZh: 当你让世界看到你的美，财富也会看到你。
S6-15.safetyDisclaimerEn: This section is not financial advice. It does not predict income, investment outcomes, or financial success. It reflects symbolic patterns around worth, receiving, value expression, visibility, and resource flow.
S6-15.safetyDisclaimerZh: 此部分不是财务建议，也不预测收入、投资结果或财务成功。它只用于映照你与价值、接收、表达、可见度与资源流动之间的象征性关系。

S6-16.moneyCoreFrequencyEn: Wealth is reflected through stable, practical, and tangible value creation.
S6-16.moneyCoreFrequencyZh: 财富来自稳定、实在、务实的价值创造。
S6-16.shadowFrequencyEn: Fear of risk, excessive conservatism, and reluctance to change.
S6-16.shadowFrequencyZh: 害怕冒险、过度保守、不敢改变。
S6-16.soulWealthRelationshipEn: Your wealth pattern tends to build through steadiness rather than volatility.
S6-16.soulWealthRelationshipZh: 你的财富稳健增长，不是暴涨暴跌。
S6-16.karmicMoneyLessonEn: Learn to upgrade your identity with courage instead of only seeking stability.
S6-16.karmicMoneyLessonZh: 学习勇敢地升级你的身份，而不是只求稳定。
S6-16.wisewaveGuidanceEn: The deeper your roots, the higher your abundance can grow.
S6-16.wisewaveGuidanceZh: 你的根扎得越深，你的丰盛长得越高。
S6-16.safetyDisclaimerEn: This section is not financial advice. It does not predict income, investment outcomes, or financial success. It reflects symbolic patterns around worth, receiving, value expression, visibility, and resource flow.
S6-16.safetyDisclaimerZh: 此部分不是财务建议，也不预测收入、投资结果或财务成功。它只用于映照你与价值、接收、表达、可见度与资源流动之间的象征性关系。

S6-17.displayTitleZh: S6-17 · 灵魂智慧落地之财
S6-17.moneyCoreFrequencyEn: Wealth is reflected through soul wisdom, insight, and intuitive interpretation.
S6-17.moneyCoreFrequencyZh: 财富来自你的灵魂智慧、洞察、直觉解析能力。
S6-17.shadowFrequencyEn: Lack of structure, drifting too far into abstraction, and difficulty grounding.
S6-17.shadowFrequencyZh: 缺乏结构、过于飘远、无法落地。
S6-17.soulWealthRelationshipEn: Your wealth pattern opens when spiritual wisdom becomes practical value.
S6-17.soulWealthRelationshipZh: 财富出现于你将灵性智慧转化为实用价值时。
S6-17.karmicMoneyLessonEn: Avoid spiritual escape; turn wisdom into action.
S6-17.karmicMoneyLessonZh: 避免灵性逃避，把智慧化为行动。
S6-17.wisewaveGuidanceEn: You may see more than others, but you still need to step forward.
S6-17.wisewaveGuidanceZh: 你看到的比别人多，但你必须迈出去。

S6-18.moneyCoreFrequencyEn: Wealth is reflected through a strong energetic field, influence, vision, and personal power.
S6-18.moneyCoreFrequencyZh: 财富来自你的强大能量场、影响力、愿景与个人力量。
S6-18.shadowFrequencyEn: Control, attachment, power struggle, and fear of loss.
S6-18.shadowFrequencyZh: 控制、执着、权力斗争、害怕失去。
S6-18.soulWealthRelationshipEn: Your wealth pattern becomes more magnetic when power softens and flow is allowed.
S6-18.soulWealthRelationshipZh: 你的财富随着你放软能量、允许流动而成为“吸引式丰盛”。
S6-18.karmicMoneyLessonEn: Release control and let life cooperate with you.
S6-18.karmicMoneyLessonZh: 放下掌控，让生命与你合作。
S6-18.wisewaveGuidanceEn: Your power is not here to dominate; it is here to create.
S6-18.wisewaveGuidanceZh: 你的力量不是用来压迫的，而是用来创造的。

S6-19.shadowFrequencyEn: Impulsiveness, haste, and lack of patience.

S6-19.soulWealthRelationshipZh: 财富跟随你“强化判断力”的能力而增长。
S6-19.karmicMoneyLessonEn: Learn to reflect before moving, rather than being pushed by excitement.
S6-19.karmicMoneyLessonZh: 学会三思而后行，而不是被兴奋推着走。
S6-19.wisewaveGuidanceEn: Speed is your gift; clarity is your guide.

S6-20.soulWealthRelationshipZh: 你越能拥抱变化，你的财富越能突破上限。

S6-20.karmicMoneyLessonZh: 放下旧模式，让生命向你展示新路径。
S6-20.wisewaveGuidanceEn: Stability is not stagnation; change is not a threat.

S6-21.soulWealthRelationshipZh: 财富随着你“相信自己的美学价值”而增长。

S6-21.karmicMoneyLessonZh: 停止用别人的眼睛定义自己的价值。
S6-21.wisewaveGuidanceEn: Your sensitivity is a source of value.

S6-22.shadowFrequencyEn: Doubt, harshness, self-criticism, and judging others.
S6-22.shadowFrequencyZh: 怀疑、严苛、自我批判、评判他人。
S6-22.soulWealthRelationshipEn: Your wealth pattern is closely connected to self-acceptance.
S6-22.soulWealthRelationshipZh: 财富与“自我接纳”呈正比关系。
S6-22.karmicMoneyLessonEn: Learn to treat yourself gently instead of demanding too much.

S6-35.wisewaveGuidanceZh: 当你做自己，你就成为磁石。

S6-36.moneyCoreFrequencyEn: Wealth is reflected through analysis, judgment, and logical structure.
S6-36.moneyCoreFrequencyZh: 财富来自你的分析能力、判断力与逻辑结构。
S6-36.shadowFrequencyEn: Overthinking, lack of action, and missed opportunities.
S6-36.shadowFrequencyZh: 过度思考、不行动、错失机会。
S6-36.soulWealthRelationshipEn: Your wealth pattern appears through implementation.
S6-36.soulWealthRelationshipZh: 财富随着你的“实施能力”而出现。
S6-36.wisewaveGuidanceEn: You see clearly enough. Now move toward it.
S6-36.wisewaveGuidanceZh: 你已经看得够清楚了，现在走向它。
S6-36.safetyDisclaimerEn: This section is not financial advice. It does not predict income, investment outcomes, or financial success. It reflects symbolic patterns around worth, receiving, value expression, visibility, and resource flow.

S6-37.moneyCoreFrequencyEn: Wealth is reflected through inner strength, life wisdom, and insight into truth.
S6-37.moneyCoreFrequencyZh: 财富来自你的精神力量、生命智慧与真理洞察力。
S6-37.shadowFrequencyEn: Coldness, disconnection from emotion, and resistance to the material world.
S6-37.shadowFrequencyZh: 冷漠、脱离情感、抵触物质世界。
S6-37.soulWealthRelationshipEn: Your wealth pattern expands as wisdom becomes service.
S6-37.soulWealthRelationshipZh: 财富随着你愿意“化智慧为服务”而扩大。
S6-37.karmicMoneyLessonEn: Accept matter instead of rejecting it.
S6-37.karmicMoneyLessonZh: 接受物质，而不是拒绝它。
S6-37.wisewaveGuidanceEn: You are a vessel for wisdom and also for abundance.
S6-37.wisewaveGuidanceZh: 你是智慧的容器，也是丰盛的容器。
S6-37.safetyDisclaimerEn: This section is not financial advice. It does not predict income, investment outcomes, or financial success. It reflects symbolic patterns around worth, receiving, value expression, visibility, and resource flow.
S6-37.safetyDisclaimerZh: 此部分不是财务建议，也不预测收入、投资结果或财务成功。它只用于映照你与价值、接收、表达、可见度与资源流动之间的象征性关系。

S6-38.moneyCoreFrequencyEn: Wealth is reflected through spiritual strength, energetic field, and presence.
S6-38.moneyCoreFrequencyZh: 财富来自你的灵性力量、磁场、存在感。
S6-38.shadowFrequencyEn: Over-mystification, unbalanced energy use, and self-isolation.
S6-38.shadowFrequencyZh: 过度神秘化、失衡的能量使用、自我孤立。
S6-38.soulWealthRelationshipEn: Your wealth pattern strengthens when energy is allowed to flow.
S6-38.soulWealthRelationshipZh: 财富随着你“让能量流动”而提高。
S6-38.karmicMoneyLessonEn: Your power comes from openness, not closure.
S6-38.karmicMoneyLessonZh: 你的力量来自开放，而不是封闭。
S6-38.wisewaveGuidanceEn: When you let light flow, you also let value flow.
S6-38.wisewaveGuidanceZh: 当你让光流动，你也让财富流动。
S6-38.safetyDisclaimerEn: This section is not financial advice. It does not predict income, investment outcomes, or financial success. It reflects symbolic patterns around worth, receiving, value expression, visibility, and resource flow.
S6-38.safetyDisclaimerZh: 此部分不是财务建议，也不预测收入、投资结果或财务成功。它只用于映照你与价值、接收、表达、可见度与资源流动之间的象征性关系。

S6-39.moneyCoreFrequencyEn: Wealth is reflected through creative potential, life passion, and soul fire.
S6-39.moneyCoreFrequencyZh: 财富来自你的创造潜能、生命激情与灵魂火焰。
S6-39.shadowFrequencyEn: Impulsiveness, scattered energy, lack of direction, and emotional reactivity.
S6-39.shadowFrequencyZh: 冲动、分散、缺乏方向、情绪化。
S6-39.soulWealthRelationshipEn: Your wealth pattern expands as focus strengthens.
S6-39.soulWealthRelationshipZh: 财富随着你“聚焦”而爆炸性增长。
S6-39.karmicMoneyLessonEn: You do not lack energy; you need direction.
S6-39.wisewaveGuidanceEn: When you illuminate one true aim, life can illuminate your path.
S6-39.wisewaveGuidanceZh: 当你点亮一个目标，宇宙会点亮你。
S6-39.safetyDisclaimerEn: This section is not financial advice. It does not predict income, investment outcomes, or financial success. It reflects symbolic patterns around worth, receiving, value expression, visibility, and resource flow.
S6-39.safetyDisclaimerZh: 此部分不是财务建议，也不预测收入、投资结果或财务成功。它只用于映照你与价值、接收、表达、可见度与资源流动之间的象征性关系。

S6-40.moneyCoreFrequencyEn: Wealth is reflected through responsibility, structure, planning, and execution.
S6-40.moneyCoreFrequencyZh: 财富来自你的责任、结构、规划与执行。
S6-40.shadowFrequencyEn: Suppressed passion, over-responsibility, and fear of failure.
S6-40.shadowFrequencyZh: 压抑激情、过度负责、害怕失败。
S6-40.soulWealthRelationshipEn: Your wealth pattern becomes lighter as self-pressure reduces.
S6-40.soulWealthRelationshipZh: 财富随着你减少“自我压力”而变得轻松。
S6-40.karmicMoneyLessonEn: You are not the weight of the world.
S6-40.wisewaveGuidanceEn: When self-criticism softens, abundance can arrive more naturally.
S6-40.wisewaveGuidanceZh: 当你放下苛责，丰盛自然到来。
S6-40.safetyDisclaimerEn: This section is not financial advice. It does not predict income, investment outcomes, or financial success. It reflects symbolic patterns around worth, receiving, value expression, visibility, and resource flow.

S6-41.moneyCoreFrequencyEn: Wealth is reflected through foresight, strategic wisdom, and future orientation.
S6-41.moneyCoreFrequencyZh: 财富来自你的远见、策略智慧与未来导向。
S6-41.shadowFrequencyEn: Over-planning, lack of action, and worry about the future.
S6-41.shadowFrequencyZh: 过度计划、不行动、担忧未来。
S6-41.soulWealthRelationshipEn: Your wealth pattern grows as action becomes more timely.
S6-41.soulWealthRelationshipZh: 财富随着你“行动速度提升”而增长。
S6-41.karmicMoneyLessonEn: The future does not change through imagination alone; it changes through action.
S6-41.karmicMoneyLessonZh: 未来不会因想象而改变，只会因行动而改变。
S6-41.wisewaveGuidanceEn: You can see the future direction; now walk toward it.
S6-41.wisewaveGuidanceZh: 你看到未来，现在走进去。
S6-41.safetyDisclaimerEn: This section is not financial advice. It does not predict income, investment outcomes, or financial success. It reflects symbolic patterns around worth, receiving, value expression, visibility, and resource flow.

S6-42.moneyCoreFrequencyEn: Wealth is reflected through sharp insight, intuitive wisdom, and soul depth.
S6-42.moneyCoreFrequencyZh: 财富来自你的敏锐洞察、直觉智慧与灵魂深度。
S6-42.shadowFrequencyEn: Inner friction, doubt, and over-analysis of the self.
S6-42.shadowFrequencyZh: 内耗、怀疑、过度分析自我。
S6-42.soulWealthRelationshipEn: Your wealth pattern expands as self-denial decreases.
S6-42.soulWealthRelationshipZh: 财富随着你减少“自我否定”而扩展。
S6-42.karmicMoneyLessonEn: Stop doubting your value and strength.
S6-42.karmicMoneyLessonZh: 不再怀疑自己的价值与力量。
S6-42.wisewaveGuidanceEn: When you recognize yourself, value can recognize you too.
S6-42.wisewaveGuidanceZh: 当你认可自己，丰盛也会认可你。
S6-42.safetyDisclaimerEn: This section is not financial advice. It does not predict income, investment outcomes, or financial success. It reflects symbolic patterns around worth, receiving, value expression, visibility, and resource flow.

S6-43.moneyCoreFrequencyEn: Wealth is reflected through innovation, breakthrough thinking, and originality.
S6-43.moneyCoreFrequencyZh: 财富来自你的革新意识、突破性思维与独创性。
S6-43.shadowFrequencyEn: Rebellion, impulsiveness, unwillingness to compromise, and rejection of structure.
S6-43.shadowFrequencyZh: 叛逆、冲动、不愿妥协、拒绝结构。
S6-43.soulWealthRelationshipEn: Your wealth pattern multiplies as collaboration matures.
S6-43.soulWealthRelationshipZh: 财富随着你“学会协作”而倍增。
S6-43.karmicMoneyLessonEn: Freedom is not rebellion; it is choice.
S6-43.karmicMoneyLessonZh: 自由不是反抗，而是选择。
S6-43.wisewaveGuidanceEn: Your soul is not here to fight the world; it is here to change it.
S6-43.wisewaveGuidanceZh: 你的灵魂不是来对抗世界的，而是来改变世界的。
S6-43.safetyDisclaimerEn: This section is not financial advice. It does not predict income, investment outcomes, or financial success. It reflects symbolic patterns around worth, receiving, value expression, visibility, and resource flow.

S6-44.moneyCoreFrequencyEn: Wealth is reflected through soul strength, leadership frequency, and a high sense of mission.
S6-44.moneyCoreFrequencyZh: 财富来自你的灵魂力量、领导频率与高维使命感。
S6-44.shadowFrequencyEn: Loneliness, pressure, self-doubt, and carrying too much.
S6-44.shadowFrequencyZh: 孤独感、压力、自我否定、承担过多。
S6-44.soulWealthRelationshipEn: Your wealth pattern expands as co-creation becomes possible.
S6-44.soulWealthRelationshipZh: 财富随着你学会“共同创造”而扩大。
S6-44.karmicMoneyLessonEn: You do not need to carry the whole mission alone.
S6-44.karmicMoneyLessonZh: 你不需要独自完成所有使命。
S6-44.wisewaveGuidanceEn: Your strength comes from resonance with the world.
S6-44.wisewaveGuidanceZh: 你的力量来自你与世界的共鸣。
S6-44.safetyDisclaimerEn: This section is not financial advice. It does not predict income, investment outcomes, or financial success. It reflects symbolic patterns around worth, receiving, value expression, visibility, and resource flow.
